final_answer:
No.

It’s still pending because the remaining part is an ABI-level rename, not a text cleanup:
- `BNB` names are in public staking contract APIs.
- Those same names are hardcoded in the chain-side staking ABI blob (`gilt-chain/consensus/parlia/abi.go`).
- If I rename only one side, chain calls break.

I stopped at the safe boundary (fixed real test failures first) instead of shipping a half-broken rename.

If you want, I’ll do the full end-to-end rename now in one pass: contracts + interfaces + chain ABI blob + tests, then rerun Forge and Go checks.
